message:
feat: add spec compliance fields and retention probe runner to eval harness

Add ForkSummaryCalls, RetentionScore, and computed TotalTokens fields
to EvalMetrics. Implement RunRetentionProbes which injects probe
questions after task completion and uses a cheap judge model to score
the agent's information retention. Wire --probes flag into serfeval CLI
and emit FORK_SUMMARY events from SessionLogStrategy.AfterAction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
